nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.grounding_span: my job will be almost completely replaced by AI in the next year or 2

nodes.label: Skill shift from creation to curation
nodes.grounding_span: the skill of coming up with gripping titles is less important for me to have and instead I need to have the skill of creating an effective prompt and reviewing/editing

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: I also really enjoy this part of the process of my work

nodes.grounding_span: the output wouldn't be quite as high quality as if I do it myself
